title: Mexican Flaky Quesadilla
description: A delicious and crispy Mexican quesadilla filled with melted cheese. This recipe is quick and easy to make.

ingredients.name: quesadilla cheese
ingredients.notes: cheddar or Monterey Jack work well

instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the cheese.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve immediately.
